name: CFG Digital Banking Portal — MFA Policy
description: Zero Trust MFA enforcement policy for Crestview Financial Group digital banking portal. Enforces MFA on every session with adaptive risk assessment enabled.

zta_notes.principle: Never trust, always verify — no session is implicitly trusted regardless of network location or device
zta_notes.protect_surface_linkage: Applications layer — CFG digital banking portal, core banking, wealth management
zta_notes.regulatory_alignment: OSFI B-13 Principle 3 — continuous access verification and monitoring

zta_notes.principle: Risk-based adaptive authentication — high-risk signals trigger additional verification
zta_notes.protect_surface_linkage: Applications + Data layers — step-up enforced before access to sensitive financial data
zta_notes.regulatory_alignment: OSFI B-13 — adaptive controls proportional to risk profile

zta_notes.principle: Privileged identity requires strongest authentication — SWIFT operators require hardware token + dual approval
zta_notes.protect_surface_linkage: Services layer — SWIFT payment network access
zta_notes.regulatory_alignment: OSFI B-13 + FINTRAC — privileged access to payment systems requires strongest controls
zta_notes.real_world_reference: Controls designed to prevent the attack vector used in the 2016 Bangladesh Bank SWIFT heist ($81M USD)
